tone-rewriter.assertion: Output contains the rewritten text followed by a tone shift note describing what changed in vocabulary, sentence structure, and voice
All facts, data, and figures from the original text are preserved exactly in the rewrite
Output includes a word count comparison line showing original and rewritten counts

word-count-reducer.assertion: Final word count is within 5% of the specified target or the reduction note explains why
Output ends with a word count note in the format 'Original: X words → Reduced: Y words (Z% reduction)'
The reduced text reads naturally with no orphan references or choppy transitions caused by cuts

tldr-writer.assertion: Summary is 2-4 sentences of continuous prose with no bullet points, between 50-75 words
Summary captures the single most important point, not a list of topics covered
Word count is shown in parentheses after the summary

subheadline-writer.assertion: Output provides 2 subheadline options, each labelled with format type
No words from the headline are repeated in either subheadline option
Word count and character count are shown for each option

pull-quote-selector.assertion: Output contains numbered entries with the quote in quotation marks, speaker attribution, a rationale note, and character count
No two selected quotes make the same point or cover overlapping ground
Quotes are drawn from different sections of the article, not clustered from a single passage

photo-caption-writer.assertion: Caption is 1-2 sentences with a present-tense first sentence describing what is visible in the image
No assumptions about emotional state or intentions of people pictured
Names, titles, or locations that cannot be confirmed from the description are flagged with [VERIFY]

paragraph-clarity-rewriter.assertion: Output contains the rewritten paragraph followed by a 2-3 sentence explanation of what was changed and why
Average sentence length in the rewrite is shorter than the original
Original and rewritten word counts are shown as a single line at the end

news-article-writer.assertion: Article begins with a summary lede of 25-35 words containing the most newsworthy fact
Article follows inverted pyramid structure and can be cut at any paragraph break
Every fact in the article was provided in the input - nothing invented or assumed

feature-article-writer.assertion: Article follows the five-part arc: hook, context, development, turn, resolution
Word count is within 10% of the target specified in the input
Output ends with a Source Material Used note listing which provided inputs were incorporated
